--- Thread (40 messages, 2020-12-21) ---
[2020-12-21 16:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): steelforge is a blue sink that opens up more options
[2020-12-21 16:18] masn6811 (Masne98888): the only real thing pixie does that sforge doesn't is let you spam drakes on not enough drones to support the blue
[2020-12-21 16:18] masn6811 (Masne98888): and granularity exploits i guess, but not even super much
[2020-12-21 16:20] megasupp (mega-supp): It also makes doomed mech+polywall more powerful by letting you spend second blue on pixie
[2020-12-21 16:20] megasupp (mega-supp): But steelforge click sacs a drone
[2020-12-21 16:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): what am i not getting
[2020-12-21 16:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): theres a few cases where you want to sink 1 blue but not 2, but none where being able to do so makes the strategy decisions more interesting
[2020-12-21 16:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): if you're going to polywall every turn, you just do it and get a pixie with it
[2020-12-21 16:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): if steelforge is in the set instead, theres an interesting choice whether to float the blue, or buy another blue so you can sink 2
[2020-12-21 16:22] megasupp (mega-supp): It also requires you to buy steelforge and sometimes you would rather not do that
[2020-12-21 16:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): which again makes it more interesting
[2020-12-21 16:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): steelforge gives you a meaningful choice when drake is in the set
[2020-12-21 16:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): steelforge is also more influential on the average set
[2020-12-21 16:23] megasupp (mega-supp): It gives a meaningful choice when you choose the strategy
[2020-12-21 16:24] velizar_ (Name): Even if another unit already fulfills a similar role, that doesn't mean it shouldn't exist
[2020-12-21 16:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): steelforge does it more, because i claimed "steelforge is also more influential on the average set". sure, pixie might push you towards blue a bit more than steelforge does in drake sets, but really thats a corner case
[2020-12-21 16:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): and honestly pixie is such a blank card that it generally has very little impact on strategy
[2020-12-21 16:26] velizar_ (Name): If you like more cards with impact on strategy, you can play base+11
[2020-12-21 16:27] megasupp (mega-supp): Also pixie allows you to get a very low econ arka when steelforge click would leave you on 7 drones after 3-4 clicks
[2020-12-21 16:27] velizar_ (Name): Base+10+pixie is almost like base+10
[2020-12-21 16:27] velizar_ (Name): But base+10 is already well liked
[2020-12-21 16:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): yes, i play base+11 so i end up playing base+10 instead when pixie is in the set. thats totally what i wanted when i asked for base+10
[2020-12-21 16:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): the person who clicks steelforge every turn will beat the person who buys 2 pixies every turn
[2020-12-21 16:28] velizar_ (Name): Evem though pixie and gauss charge exist, people often prefer playing base+8-10, so if pixie and gauss charge didn't exist, those people would prefer playing base+even less than 8-10
[2020-12-21 16:28] awaclus: >i end up playing base+10 instead when pixie is in the set. thats totally what i wanted when i asked for base+10
well, yes
[2020-12-21 16:28] megasupp (mega-supp): Should we exclude all the deadeye savior sets from the pool then?
[2020-12-21 16:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): savior is actually quite useful in sets without deadeye
[2020-12-21 16:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): same with lucina and apollo
[2020-12-21 16:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): pixie is like never on these levels
[2020-12-21 16:29] velizar_ (Name): That doesn't answer the question though
[2020-12-21 16:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean it seems arbitrary
[2020-12-21 16:30] velizar_ (Name): And I think it might be a good idea, at least above a certain ELO
[2020-12-21 16:30] velizar_ (Name): ... though there might exist degenerate sets where savior is bought in a deadeye set?
[2020-12-21 16:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): and honestly, allowing the counters to actually be seen in action is a good thing
[2020-12-21 16:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): imagine the opposite case
[2020-12-21 16:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): where chrono and antima were never together
[2020-12-21 16:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): so nobody would be able to experience that combo
[2020-12-21 16:31] velizar_ (Name): You could stop including them after people have seen it 10 times
[2020-12-21 16:32] cooledcannon: i imagine galv and perhaps caut and perhaps auric are stronger anime synergies
[2020-12-21 16:32] cooledcannon: chrono anime suffers from arka/evisc syndrome in that its super telegraphed

[2020-12-23 17:10] elyot: Event is running again today
[2020-12-23 17:10] elyot: I will ship a nerfed evisc
[2020-12-23 17:10] elyot: -1 cost and -1 lifespan
[2020-12-23 17:10] elyot: were there any other changes folks wanted to see?
[2020-12-23 17:13] elyot: One thing I will try to do is ship sounds and animations for evisc and felid
[2020-12-23 17:13] elyot: so that all 4 new units are actually shippable
[2020-12-23 17:13] elyot: I'll probably make them on livestream starting in an hour or so
[2020-12-23 17:19] silentslayers: I would like to see 7RR felid which has EE->XXXX

(small nerf)
[2020-12-23 17:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): yes, that was the other one we were talking about
[2020-12-23 17:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): the other things we wanted to see
[2020-12-23 17:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): pixie and auto removed from event *entirely*, and drop rates decreased
[2020-12-23 17:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): (for the other changed units)
[2020-12-23 17:20] silentslayers: if you're dropping pixie you should drop g charge
[2020-12-23 17:20] silentslayers: we haven't made any progress with g charge imo
[2020-12-23 17:20] silentslayers: this "g charge pack" thing isn't very promising to me
[2020-12-23 17:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think g charge pack is great
[2020-12-23 17:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): i love seeing it in sets
[2020-12-23 17:21] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): I'm opposing removing any of the current units... what's the point? let's add more units so they show up less
[2020-12-23 17:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): just having the flexible way to hit 5 damage against evis feels really nice for example
[2020-12-23 17:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): honestly, i think current auto is fine'
[2020-12-23 17:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): but punf and boat were pushing hard against it
[2020-12-23 17:22] silentslayers: Come on be realistic, we can't just add units. This is the first time we've had new units in forever
[2020-12-23 17:22] silentslayers: it's not like we can just be like "Elyot add 100 units thanks"
[2020-12-23 17:22] awaclus: Elyot add 100 units thanks
[2020-12-23 17:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): i also wouldnt mind seeing a small magna buff, but im in the minority here
[2020-12-23 17:23] silentslayers: you should explain your reasoning for auto to elyot
[2020-12-23 17:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): explain your reasoning, you guys are pushing for the removal harder than i was
[2020-12-23 17:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean your argument was auto was worse than shredder for soak?
i still dont get it, my opinion on that is "no duh, thats the point"
[2020-12-23 17:24] silentslayers: its either degenerate or quite weak
[2020-12-23 17:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): like i believe in the automaid harass, but neither punf or boat do
[2020-12-23 17:25] elyot: you mean you think it's a correct strategy to execute? Or you mean you think it's good for the game for that to be a thing?
[2020-12-23 17:26] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think its correct some of the time. i also think its good for the game, but i could be convinced otherwise on either
[2020-12-23 17:26] masn6811 (Masne98888): (and that its good for the game for it to only be correct some of the time)
[2020-12-23 17:26] elyot: punf/boat think it's never correct? or not good for the game?
[2020-12-23 17:26] masn6811 (Masne98888): @Punf @SilentSlayers
[2020-12-23 17:26] elyot: (I mean I'd rather hear their opinion directly)
[2020-12-23 17:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): honestly, one thing i love about the automaid harass is that it makes assymetric tech correct
[2020-12-23 17:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): like if i had any complaint about the game as is, imo its too often correct for both players to go for the same build
[2020-12-23 17:30] silentslayers: I think it's too weak to be that great as a harasser, so it's rarely correct to do this (you need some other support for it to be right), don't be tricked by event with eviscerator and mixer being prevalent, in actual games if/when it gets pushed to ladder, I think it will rarely be bought at its 2B version, and if you buff it to a point where it's pretty dang good harrasser (let's say, that 1B version), then it's too degenerate in a lot of other circumstances. I think the knobs just don't work, especially given the limitations from campaign. Also want to add that it feels more skillful if you have to choose to click it, but the 1B version was too degenerate unfortunately. Feels like there's no winning on this one at least to me :/
[2020-12-23 17:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): my personal response on this
[2020-12-23 17:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): > I think it's too weak to be that great as a harasser, so it's rarely correct to do this (you need some other support for it to be right), don't be tricked by event with eviscerator and mixer being prevalent
[2020-12-23 17:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think this is true, but not quite as rare as boat thinks. i also think this is a good thing
[2020-12-23 17:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): the harass is only really available to p1
[2020-12-23 17:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): so it has to be weak enough so it doesnt feel unfair when its available
[2020-12-23 17:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): > I think it will rarely be bought at its 2B version
im not convinced on this. automaid has a number of uses
- as a rush
- as a lead to evis
- as a harass
- as a macro unit
- as a sink
[2020-12-23 17:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): admittedly, its not great at any of these roles
[2020-12-23 17:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): it doesnt rush as well as vore, macro as well as shredder, or support high blue amounts as well as steelforge
[2020-12-23 17:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): but i think thats a good thing
[2020-12-23 17:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): its a unit that you might buy 2 or so times over the course of a game, filling any of these roles
[2020-12-23 17:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i think thats pretty neat

Not going to be completely beat up if it makes it in, just wish we had something better.
